title: Cost profile (fleet schema; Contract 3/7 input)
description: Named, versioned cost basis for benchmark cost reporting (benchmark-result.cost.cost_profile_ref) and capacity recommendations. PROVENANCE IS MANDATORY AND STRUCTURAL: every rate is a provenanced value object ({value, provenance}) — a bare number is not schema-valid, so fabricated defaults are not expressible. Prices are volatile ecosystem facts (as of 2026-07 — re-verify at use time); the as_of date inside each rate's provenance is the freshness record.

version.description: Consumers reference cost profiles by id + version; cost numbers computed against different profile versions are not comparable.

currency.description: Program cost reporting is USD-denominated (benchmark-result cost fields are *_usd). Additional currencies would be an additive MINOR.

id.description: profile_id of the hardware-profile this rate prices.

notes.description: Rate-specific caveats (e.g. spot preemption risk not priced in).

provenance.description: MANDATORY provenance: how this value was established and when. basis=measured: from an identified record (e.g. actual billing data). basis=source-reported: from an identified external source (vendor pricing page). basis=assumed: an explicit assumption — never a silent default; state the reasoning in notes.

source.description: REQUIRED for measured and source-reported values: what produced or reported the value.
